# Futonix

> Futonix is an international design-build and automation firm delivering high-performance
> medical, warehouse and hospitality facilities end-to-end — one accountable team from
> design through construction to building automation.

Futonix combines architecture, engineering (MEP), construction and smart-building automation
under a single contract ("design-build"), removing the handoffs between designer, builder and
integrator. The firm specialises in three sectors where compliance and performance are
non-negotiable: Medical & Healthcare, Warehouse & Logistics, and Hospitality & Leisure.

## Key facts
- Model: integrated design-build + automation (single point of accountability)
- Sectors: Medical & Healthcare; Warehouse & Logistics; Hospitality & Leisure
- Reach: international (projects across 14 countries)
- Differentiators: BIM-led delivery, self-performed trades, smart-building automation, on-time handover
- Contact: hello@futonix.com

## Pages
- [Home](https://udgok.github.io/Futonix-Website/index.html): Overview, process, sectors, FAQ.
- [Sectors](https://udgok.github.io/Futonix-Website/sectors.html): Detail on Medical, Warehouse and Hospitality design-build.
- [Projects](https://udgok.github.io/Futonix-Website/projects.html): Selected work and outcomes.
- [About](https://udgok.github.io/Futonix-Website/about.html): The design-build approach and standards.
- [Contact](https://udgok.github.io/Futonix-Website/contact.html): Start a project enquiry.

## Common questions
- What is design-build? One contract and one team for both design and construction — faster delivery, fewer gaps, single accountability.
- Which sectors does Futonix serve? Medical & Healthcare, Warehouse & Logistics, and Hospitality & Leisure.
- Does Futonix work internationally? Yes — projects delivered across 14 countries.
- What does "automation" include? Smart building controls, monitoring and integration (HVAC, lighting, access, energy) commissioned at handover.
